_comment: BUSINESS LOGIC DEFAULTS — Do not change these unless updating workflow/parsing rules. Project-specific values are in orchestrator_project.json
sheet_name_comment: Google Sheet tab name where results are written. Must match exactly. Tip: start a rename in Sheets to see the current name.
imap_server_comment: IMAP server for email retrieval. Use imap.gmail.com for Gmail, or your company's IMAP endpoint.
smtp_server_comment: SMTP server for sending notifications. Use smtp.gmail.com for Gmail, or your company's SMTP endpoint.
smtp_port_comment: SMTP port. Typically 587 for TLS or 465 for SSL.
mva_pattern_comment: Regex to parse MVA codes. Group 1: 8 digits, Group 2: optional suffixes (r=Repair, c=Claim). Do not change unless parsing format changes.
cycle_tracker_store_comment: Path to JSON file that tracks processed MVA cycles. Created at runtime.
cycle_gap_grace_days_comment: Number of days to allow between cycles before flagging as a gap. Used for cycle tracking logic.
cycle_completed_retention_comment: Number of completed cycles to retain in memory before pruning. Higher values = more memory used.
work_item_default_flag_comment: Default status flag for work items. Typically 'verified' or 'pending'.
warmup_mva_comment: Dummy MVA used for Selenium warmup/initialization. Any valid 8-digit number works.
columns_comment: Column order for Google Sheet output. Order must match the GlassClaims tab structure.
